<br>

### full disclosure

i use ai as a writing assistant while coding; i do use claude code and such, but i try to do it sparingly and actually learn. i don't consider myself a "vibe coder" and i take full responsibility for all code shared. none of my pull requests or issues will ever be ai slop; i genuinely only contribute stuff i did or found myself, to projects i actually care about.

none of my actual writing is written with ai. at worst, some readmes are there as placeholders, but when they are, it'll be blatantly obvious.

<br>

### projects

<table>
<tr>
<td width="33%" valign="top">

**systems and infra**

**`nix-config`** <br>
declarative multi-host nixos flake for my desktop, laptop, and homeserver.

**`e-waste homeserver`** <br>
a 2013 laptop repurposed into a small nixos homeserver for self-hosting docker containers (navidrome, filebrowser, searxng, vaultwarden), backups. "powered" by nix-config.

**`libreboot-nidhoggr`** <br>
personal libreboot patch set for the thinkpad t480; enables smt, natacpi battery thresholds, fn/ctrl swap at ec level, and a grub+seabios dual payload.

</td>
<td width="33%" valign="top">

**tools and apis**

**`pswdgen-api`** <br>
dockerized ssh and password generator api with a github actions ci/cd pipeline.

**`vibe-oopsie`** <br>
scans git history (including dangling commits) for leaked secrets.

**`kebab-folders`** <br>
cli to preview and convert folder names to kebab-case.

</td>
<td width="33%" valign="top">

**toys and visualizers**

**`heart-cli`** <br>
cli gift; `heartfetch` is a neofetch rewrite that prints a spinning 3d heart as the logo, `sandboxheart` is a mini sandbox.

**`uardal`** <br>
romanian wordle-style game that picks a random word each visit.

**`sortvisualizer`** <br>
quicksort visualizer on html canvas with in-place line swaps.

**`mandelbrot`** <br>
mandelbrot set visualizer with a webassembly-accelerated core.

</td>
</tr>
</table>
